items.claim: Wayne Kong has an 84% takedown defense rate.
Cortez averages two takedowns per three-round fight.
items.quote: which she does get two over the course of three rounds on average

items.claim: Wayne Kong has only given up three takedowns in five UFC fights.
items.quote: only three takedowns in five fights

items.claim: Luke Riley has a 37% takedown defense rate.
Luke Riley is getting better every time he fights.
items.quote: he's not only undefeated, but getting better every time we see him.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka III lands approximately one takedown every other round.
items.quote: Kamaka can land like a takedown every other round.

items.claim: Adrien Giannes has a 4-inch reach advantage over Cody Garbrandt.
Adrien Giannes lands 6 significant strikes per minute compared to 2.8 for Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Giannes six significant strikes per minute to 2.8 for Gar Brandt.
